title: tephrosia franchetii
intro: Tephrosia franchetii, also known as White Pea Tree or White Millettia, is a perennial plant species native to China. It is a member of the pea family and is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, due to its health benefits in reducing inflammation and improving immune function. Tephrosia franchetii is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion for its medicinal use, and it is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
